reviews.review_title: Was A Good (Smaller) Escape Room Game
reviews.review_description:
UPDATE-   So I get to a puzzle in the game giving me 3 hints on 3 pieces of paper on the rules for the shape puzzle to fix the doorbell...
NOTHING here works and the GD puzzle doesn't make much sense to begin with!
After spending way too long thinkinv over it and trying EVERY combination of switches imaginable to no avail, I decided to ask for the hints from the menu...
You knowwhat those hints were? EXPLAINING THECEXACT SAME HINTS THE GD PAPERS ALREADY GIVE YOU!!
Like I said, nothing here works, and after so long your ill concieved puzzle stops being entertaining or reasonable and devolves into wasting my time!
So nowI can't finish the game, and there are absolutly zero guides or walkthroughs to get me by this bugged p.o.s. "puzzle". 
So Ithink I'll get arefund and just stick with Myst and other more reasonable puzzlers.
All sad because everything velse leading up to this unpassable wall was great, especially considering the price. 
Regretful...


ORIGINAL -   The game is surprisingly a bit better than I thought it would be given it's odd (though funny) premise and title as well as the very cheap price. The puzzles are simple (minus one that called for me to get a calculator + draw out a picture to figure out), though often enough I needed to use the hint system to figure out what the puzzle actually was after the first room, though I'll admit many escape room titles do that to me. 😅
The atmosphere has a very nice chill, yet slightly mysterious- vibe to it, which the great music score helps with immensely. The graphics and overall texture quality are also surprisingly superb, so even though every room is extremely small, almost everything in them is very detailed, clear, and just looks great.

So though the game is very likely incredibly short with each room being easily completed anywhere between 2 to 5 minutes (even the first run) and there's not that many rooms from what I've seen (I'm only up to Room 5 at the time of writing this)- the game offers plenty of quality content given the very low price tag.

So I definitely recommend to any fans of puzzle/ escape room games who want another in their collection, because it's definitely great for short sessions (most escape room games are not) and at a great price. 
I mean, who doesn't love having another quality VR puzzler! 🤘
They did the code wrong on level 2, it’s 52146
Great game really chill music, but really the second room is just mind bottling i just cant get past through, idk why but those hints dont work either
